json-formatter.name: Formattatore JSON
json-formatter.description: Formatta, valida e minifica dati JSON con evidenziazione della sintassi.
json-formatter.metaTitle: Formattatore e validatore JSON - Strumento JSON online gratuito
json-formatter.metaDescription: Formatta, valida e minifica dati JSON con evidenziazione della sintassi. Strumento online gratuito che funziona interamente nel browser.
json-formatter.keywords: formattatore json, validatore json, json beautifier, json minifier, json pretty print

faq.a1: Formatta (pretty-print) i dati JSON con indentazione corretta, valida la sintassi JSON e può minificare il JSON rimuovendo gli spazi bianchi.
faq.q2: I miei dati sono al sicuro?
faq.a2: Sì, tutta l'elaborazione avviene nel browser. I tuoi dati non lasciano mai il dispositivo.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Che cos'è JSON Formatter?
intro.content:
JSON Formatter is a free browser-based tool for formatting, validating, and minifying JSON data. Paste messy or minified JSON and instantly get clean, human-readable output with proper indentation and syntax highlighting.

Whether you're debugging API responses, reviewing configuration files, or preparing data for documentation, this tool makes JSON easy to read and verify — all without leaving your browser.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare JSON Formatter
howToUse.content:
1. Paste or type your JSON data into the input area
  2. Choose your preferred indentation level (2 or 4 spaces)
  3. Click Format to pretty-print, Minify to compress, or Validate to check syntax
  4. Copy the formatted result or download it as a file

Invalid JSON is highlighted with a clear error message showing exactly where the syntax issue is.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Pretty Print: Format JSON with customizable indentation (2 or 4 spaces)
  • Minify: Compress JSON by removing all whitespace for compact storage or transmission
  • Validate: Instantly check whether your JSON is syntactically correct with detailed error reporting
  • Syntax Highlighting: Color-coded keys, strings, numbers, booleans, and nulls for easy reading
  • Large Data Support: Handles large JSON files without performance issues
  • 100% Browser-Based: No server uploads — your data stays on your device

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• API Development: Format raw API responses for debugging and inspection
  • Configuration Files: Clean up package.json, tsconfig.json, or other config files
  • Data Validation: Quickly verify JSON payloads before sending to APIs
  • Documentation: Prepare well-formatted JSON examples for technical docs
  • Database Records: Inspect and format JSON stored in NoSQL databases

privacy.title: Privacy-First JSON Processing
privacy.content:
Your JSON data is processed entirely in your browser using native JavaScript parsing. No data is transmitted to any server.

  • Your data never leaves your device — zero network requests during processing
  • Safe for sensitive API keys, tokens, and configuration data
  • Works offline after the page loads
  • Verify: open DevTools (F12) → Network tab and watch — zero upload requests

base64.keywords: codifica base64, decodifica base64, convertitore base64, base64 online

faq.a1: Base64 è uno schema di codifica binario-testo che converte dati binari in caratteri ASCII. È comunemente usato in URL di dati, allegati email e payload API.
faq.a2: Attualmente questo strumento codifica e decodifica testo. La codifica Base64 dei file sarà disponibile in un aggiornamento futuro.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Che cos'è Base64 Encoder/Decoder?
intro.content:
Base64 Encoder/Decoder converts text to Base64 encoding and back. Base64 is a binary-to-text encoding scheme commonly used to embed data in URLs, emails, HTML, and JSON where binary data isn't supported.

Instantly encode any text string to Base64 or decode Base64 strings back to readable text — no software required.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare Base64 Encoder/Decoder
howToUse.content:
1. Enter your text in the input field
  2. Select Encode to convert text to Base64, or Decode to convert Base64 back to text
  3. The result appears instantly in the output area
  4. Click Copy to copy the result to your clipboard

Supports UTF-8 text including special characters, emojis, and non-Latin scripts.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Instant Encoding: Convert text to Base64 in real-time as you type
  • Instant Decoding: Decode Base64 strings back to readable text
  • UTF-8 Support: Correctly handles Unicode characters, emojis, and multi-byte text
  • Error Detection: Alerts when input is not valid Base64 during decoding
  • One-Click Copy: Copy results to clipboard instantly
  • No Size Limits: Process text of any length

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• Data URIs: Encode images or fonts as Base64 data URIs for embedding in HTML/CSS
  • API Authentication: Encode credentials for HTTP Basic Authentication headers
  • Email Attachments: Encode/decode MIME attachments in email protocols
  • JWT Tokens: Decode JWT token payloads for inspection
  • Configuration: Encode binary data for inclusion in JSON or YAML config files

privacy.title: Privacy-First Base64 Processing
privacy.content:
All encoding and decoding happens directly in your browser using the built-in btoa() and atob() APIs.

  • Your text never leaves your device — ideal for encoding sensitive credentials or tokens
  • No server-side processing or logging
  • Works completely offline after initial page load
  • Verify: open DevTools (F12) → Network tab during use — zero data transmitted

url-encoder.name: Codifica/Decodifica URL
url-encoder.description: Codifica o decodifica componenti URL per un uso sicuro negli indirizzi web.
url-encoder.metaTitle: Codificatore/Decodificatore URL - Strumento gratuito di codifica URL online
url-encoder.metaDescription: Codifica o decodifica componenti URL. Converti caratteri speciali per un uso sicuro negli indirizzi web. Strumento online gratuito.
url-encoder.keywords: codifica url, decodifica url, codificatore url, percent encoding, codifica uri
url-encoder.inputPlaceholder: Inserisci URL o testo da codificare/decodificare...

faq.a1: La codifica URL converte i caratteri speciali in formato percent-encoded (ad es. lo spazio diventa %20) in modo che possano essere usati in sicurezza negli indirizzi web.
faq.q2: Qual è la differenza tra Codifica e Codifica componente?
faq.a2: Codifica converte l'intero URL preservando i caratteri strutturali come / e ?. Codifica componente codifica tutto, compresi quei caratteri, utile per i valori dei parametri di query.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Che cos'è URL Encoder/Decoder?
intro.content:
URL Encoder/Decoder converts special characters in URLs to their percent-encoded equivalents and back. This is essential for creating valid URLs that contain spaces, ampersands, non-ASCII characters, or other reserved characters.

Use it to safely pass query parameters, encode file paths, or debug malformed URLs.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare URL Encoder/Decoder
howToUse.content:
1. Enter your text or URL component in the input field
  2. Select Encode to percent-encode special characters, or Decode to convert encoded URLs back to readable text
  3. The result updates instantly
  4. Click Copy to copy the encoded/decoded result

Encodes all characters that are unsafe in URLs per RFC 3986, including spaces, &, =, ?, #, and non-ASCII characters.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• RFC 3986 Compliant: Encodes all reserved and unsafe URL characters correctly
  • Real-Time Processing: Results update as you type
  • Unicode Support: Correctly handles international characters and emojis in URLs
  • Component Encoding: Encodes individual URL components (query params, path segments)
  • One-Click Copy: Instantly copy encoded results
  • 100% Browser-Based: No server uploads — your data stays on your device

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• Query Parameters: Encode values for safe inclusion in URL query strings
  • API Requests: Properly encode request parameters for REST APIs
  • Redirect URLs: Encode callback URLs for OAuth flows and redirects
  • File Paths: Encode file names with spaces or special characters for web servers
  • Debugging: Decode mangled URLs to see the original text

privacy.title: Privacy-First URL Processing
privacy.content:
All encoding and decoding runs entirely in your browser using native encodeURIComponent() and decodeURIComponent() functions.

  • Your URLs and parameters never leave your device
  • Safe for encoding URLs containing API keys, tokens, or session IDs
  • Works offline after the page loads

faq.a1: Oltre 12 lingue, tra cui inglese, cinese (semplificato/tradizionale), giapponese, coreano, spagnolo, francese, tedesco e altre.
faq.a2: La precisione dipende dalla qualità dell'immagine e dalla chiarezza del testo. Le immagini nitide ad alta risoluzione con un buon contrasto producono i migliori risultati.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.

intro.title: Che cos'è OCR Text Recognition?
intro.content:
OCR Text Recognition extracts readable text from images using optical character recognition powered by Tesseract.js. Upload a photo of a document, screenshot, receipt, or handwritten note, and get the text content you can copy, edit, and use.

Supports 12+ languages including English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, and more — all processed locally in your browser.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare OCR Text Recognition
howToUse.content:
1. Upload an image by clicking the dropzone or dragging it onto the page (supports JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP)
  2. Select the language of the text in the image for best accuracy
  3. Click Extract Text to start recognition
  4. Review the extracted text and copy it to your clipboard

For best results, use clear, high-contrast images with good lighting. Printed text yields higher accuracy than handwriting.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• 12+ Languages: Recognize text in English, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, and more
  • Multiple Image Formats: Accepts JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and TIFF
  • Powered by Tesseract.js: Industry-standard OCR engine running entirely in your browser via WebAssembly
  • High Accuracy: Best results on printed text, receipts, screenshots, and scanned documents
  • Copy & Edit: Extracted text is fully editable and copyable
  • 100% Local Processing: No server uploads — your documents stay private

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• Document Digitization: Convert printed documents, receipts, or letters into editable text
  • Screenshot Text Extraction: Pull text from screenshots of web pages, error messages, or chat logs
  • Translation Prep: Extract foreign-language text from images for translation
  • Data Entry: Quickly digitize text from forms, invoices, or business cards
  • Accessibility: Make image-based text accessible to screen readers

privacy.title: Privacy-First OCR Processing
privacy.content:
OCR runs entirely in your browser using Tesseract.js (WebAssembly). Language models are downloaded once and cached locally.

  • Your images and documents never leave your device — critical for sensitive documents
  • No cloud API calls — zero data transmitted during recognition
  • Works offline after language models are cached
  • Ideal for confidential documents: medical records, financial statements, legal papers

intro.title: Che cos'è ZIP Extractor?
intro.content:
ZIP Extractor lets you open and extract ZIP archive contents directly in your browser. Preview file names, sizes, and folder structure before downloading individual files or the entire contents.

No software installation needed — just drop your ZIP file and browse its contents instantly.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare ZIP Extractor
howToUse.content:
1. Drop a ZIP file onto the page or click to browse and select one
  2. View the archive contents: file names, sizes, and folder hierarchy
  3. Click individual files to download them, or extract everything at once

Supports standard ZIP archives. Large archives may take a moment to parse depending on your device.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Instant Preview: See all files and folders inside the ZIP without extracting
  • Selective Extraction: Download individual files without extracting the entire archive
  • File Size Display: See compressed and uncompressed sizes for each file
  • Folder Structure: Browse nested directory hierarchies within the archive
  • Powered by fflate: High-performance decompression using the fflate library
  • No File Size Limits: Limited only by your device's available memory

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• Quick File Inspection: Check what's inside a ZIP before extracting everything
  • Single File Download: Extract just the file you need from a large archive
  • Mobile Use: Open ZIP files on phones and tablets without a file manager
  • Chromebook Users: Extract archives when native tools aren't available
  • Email Attachments: Quickly peek inside ZIP attachments

privacy.title: Privacy-First Archive Extraction
privacy.content:
ZIP extraction runs entirely in your browser using the fflate decompression library. No files are uploaded anywhere.

  • Your archives never leave your device — safe for confidential documents
  • No server-side processing or temporary storage
  • Works offline after the page loads

intro.title: Che cos'è CSV/JSON Converter?
intro.content:
CSV/JSON Converter transforms data between CSV (comma-separated values) and JSON formats instantly. Convert spreadsheet data to JSON arrays for APIs, or transform JSON datasets into CSV for Excel or Google Sheets.

Handles headers, quoted fields, and custom delimiters — all in your browser with no data uploaded.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare CSV/JSON Converter
howToUse.content:
1. Paste your CSV or JSON data into the input area
  2. Select the conversion direction: CSV → JSON or JSON → CSV
  3. The converted result appears instantly in the output area
  4. Copy the result or download it as a file

CSV input should use the first row as column headers. JSON input should be an array of objects with consistent keys.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Bidirectional Conversion: Convert CSV to JSON and JSON to CSV
  • Auto Header Detection: Uses the first CSV row as JSON object keys
  • Handles Special Characters: Correctly processes quoted fields, commas within fields, and line breaks
  • Instant Conversion: Results appear immediately as you paste data
  • Download Output: Save converted data as .json or .csv files
  • Large Dataset Support: Handles thousands of rows efficiently

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• API Integration: Convert spreadsheet exports to JSON for API payloads
  • Data Analysis: Transform JSON API responses into CSV for Excel or Google Sheets
  • Database Migration: Convert between data formats during database import/export
  • Reporting: Convert JSON logs or records to CSV for reporting tools
  • Prototyping: Quickly create sample JSON data from spreadsheet mockups

privacy.title: Privacy-First Data Conversion
privacy.content:
All conversion happens locally in your browser using JavaScript parsing — no server round-trips.

  • Your data never leaves your device — safe for converting sensitive business data or financial reports
  • No server processing, no logging, no third-party access
  • Works offline after initial page load

intro.title: Che cos'è Hash Generator?
intro.content:
Hash Generator computes cryptographic hash values for text or files using SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 algorithms. Hashes are one-way fingerprints used to verify data integrity, compare files, and validate downloads.

Generate hashes instantly in your browser — ideal for verifying file integrity or creating content digests.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare Hash Generator
howToUse.content:
1. Enter text directly or upload a file to hash
  2. Select the hash algorithm(s): SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, or SHA-512
  3. The hash value is computed instantly and displayed
  4. Copy the hash to compare with known checksums or use in your project

For file integrity verification, compare the generated hash with the checksum provided by the file's source.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Multiple Algorithms: SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 computed simultaneously
  • Text & File Hashing: Hash typed text or uploaded files of any type
  • Instant Computation: Hash values appear in real-time
  • Web Crypto API: Uses the browser's native cryptographic engine for maximum performance
  • Copy to Clipboard: One-click copy for each hash value
  • Large File Support: Efficiently hash files of any size

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• File Integrity: Verify downloaded files haven't been tampered with by comparing checksums
  • Content Deduplication: Compare hashes to find duplicate files
  • Digital Signatures: Create content digests for signing workflows
  • Software Distribution: Generate checksums for your own file releases
  • Security Auditing: Hash files to detect unauthorized modifications

privacy.title: Privacy-First Hash Generation
privacy.content:
Hashes are computed entirely in your browser using the native Web Crypto API (crypto.subtle.digest).

  • Your text and files never leave your device — critical when hashing sensitive content
  • Uses hardware-accelerated cryptographic implementations when available
  • Works offline after the page loads

intro.title: Che cos'è Color Converter?
intro.content:
Color Converter transforms colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats with a live visual preview. Enter a color in any format and instantly see its equivalent in all other formats, along with a color swatch.

Perfect for designers and developers who need to convert between color notations for CSS, design tools, or brand guidelines.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare Color Converter
howToUse.content:
1. Enter a color value in any supported format: HEX (e.g., #3B82F6), RGB (e.g., rgb(59, 130, 246)), or HSL (e.g., hsl(217, 91%, 60%))
  2. See instant conversion to all other formats with a live color preview
  3. Click any value to copy it to your clipboard

The color picker also lets you visually select colors and get all format values at once.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Three Format Support: Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color notations
  • Live Preview: See the actual color displayed as you type or adjust values
  • Visual Color Picker: Select colors visually and get all format values
  • Instant Conversion: Results update in real-time as you type
  • One-Click Copy: Copy any color format value to clipboard
  • CSS-Ready Output: Values formatted for direct use in CSS stylesheets

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• CSS Development: Convert between color formats for stylesheets
  • Design Handoff: Translate design spec colors to code-ready values
  • Brand Guidelines: Convert brand colors between formats for documentation
  • Accessibility: Adjust HSL lightness to meet contrast ratio requirements
  • Theme Development: Generate color values for light/dark theme variables

privacy.title: Privacy-First Color Processing
privacy.content:
Color conversion uses pure JavaScript math in your browser — no server calls, no tracking.

  • No data is transmitted — color values stay entirely on your device

faq.q1: Come viene mappato il JSON in XML?
faq.a1: Le chiavi degli oggetti diventano nomi di elementi XML. Gli array producono elementi ripetuti con lo stesso nome. I valori primitivi diventano contenuto testuale.
faq.a2: Gli attributi XML non vengono preservati nell'output JSON. Solo i nomi degli elementi e il contenuto testuale vengono convertiti.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Che cos'è JSON ↔ XML Converter?
intro.content:
JSON ↔ XML Converter transforms data between JSON and XML formats. Convert JSON objects to well-formed XML documents, or parse XML back into JSON — useful for integrating systems that use different data formats.

Handles nested structures, arrays, and attributes correctly in both directions.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare JSON ↔ XML Converter
howToUse.content:
1. Paste your JSON or XML data into the input area
  2. Select the conversion direction: JSON → XML or XML → JSON
  3. The converted output appears instantly
  4. Copy the result or download it as a file

JSON arrays are converted to repeated XML elements. XML attributes are preserved during conversion.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Bidirectional Conversion: Convert JSON to XML and XML to JSON
  • Nested Structure Support: Correctly handles deeply nested objects and arrays
  • Pretty-Printed Output: XML output is properly indented for readability
  • Array Handling: JSON arrays become repeated XML elements with proper structure
  • Instant Processing: Results appear immediately
  • Download Output: Save results as .json or .xml files

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• API Integration: Convert between JSON REST APIs and XML SOAP services
  • Legacy Systems: Transform XML data from older systems to JSON for modern apps
  • Configuration: Convert between JSON and XML configuration file formats
  • Data Migration: Transform data formats during system migrations
  • Testing: Generate XML test data from JSON or vice versa

privacy.title: Privacy-First Data Conversion
privacy.content:
All conversion runs locally in your browser using JavaScript XML parsing — no server communication.

  • Your data never leaves your device
  • Safe for converting sensitive business data or configuration files
  • Works offline after initial page load

intro.title: Che cos'è Markdown Preview?
intro.content:
Markdown Preview lets you write Markdown and see a live HTML preview side by side. Write formatted text using simple Markdown syntax and instantly see how it renders — perfect for README files, blog posts, and documentation.

Supports standard Markdown including headers, lists, code blocks, links, images, tables, and more.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare Markdown Preview
howToUse.content:
1. Type or paste Markdown text in the editor pane on the left
  2. The rendered HTML preview updates in real-time on the right
  3. Use standard Markdown syntax: # headers, **bold**, *italic*, - lists, ```code blocks```
  4. Copy the rendered HTML or the Markdown source

The split-pane view lets you write and preview simultaneously without switching tabs.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali

intro.title: Che cos'è Regex Tester?
intro.content:
Regex Tester lets you write and test regular expressions against sample text with real-time highlighting of matches. See matching groups, test different flags, and debug your patterns instantly.

An essential tool for developers working with string patterns, data validation, or text parsing.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare Regex Tester
howToUse.content:
1. Enter your regular expression pattern in the pattern field
  2. Set flags as needed: g (global), i (case-insensitive), m (multiline)
  3. Type or paste test text in the text area below
  4. Matches are highlighted in real-time as you type

Capture groups are shown with distinct colors, and match details display the full match plus any captured groups.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Real-Time Matching: Matches highlight instantly as you type pattern or text
  • Flag Support: Toggle global (g), case-insensitive (i), and multiline (m) flags
  • Group Highlighting: Capture groups shown with distinct visual markers
  • Match Details: See full match text, groups, and positions
  • Error Feedback: Invalid regex syntax is caught and reported immediately
  • Native Engine: Uses your browser's built-in JavaScript regex engine

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni
useCases.content:
• Pattern Development: Build and debug regex patterns before using in code
  • Data Validation: Test email, phone number, or custom validation patterns
  • Text Parsing: Develop patterns for extracting data from log files or text
  • Search & Replace: Preview what a regex replacement will match before applying
  • Learning: Understand regex syntax through interactive experimentation

privacy.title: Privacy-First Regex Processing
privacy.content:

  • Your patterns and test data never leave your device
  • Safe for testing patterns against sensitive data like log files or user records
  • Works offline after the page loads

intro.title: Che cos'è Unix Timestamp Converter?
intro.content:
Unix Timestamp Converter converts between Unix timestamps (seconds since January 1, 1970) and human-readable date/time formats. Enter a timestamp to see the date, or pick a date to get the timestamp.

Shows the current Unix timestamp live and supports both seconds and milliseconds formats.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare Unix Timestamp Converter
howToUse.content:
1. Enter a Unix timestamp (seconds or milliseconds) to see the human-readable date and time
  2. Or select a date and time to get the corresponding Unix timestamp
  3. The current Unix timestamp is displayed live and updates in real-time
  4. Copy any value with one click

Automatically detects whether the input is in seconds or milliseconds based on the value length.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:
• Bidirectional Conversion: Timestamp → date and date → timestamp
  • Live Clock: Current Unix timestamp displayed and updating in real-time

  • Local & UTC: Shows times in both local timezone and UTC

useCases.title: Casi d'uso comuni

intro.title: Che cos'è Text Diff?
intro.content:
Text Diff compares two pieces of text and highlights the differences line by line. See exactly what was added, removed, or changed — like a simplified version of git diff in your browser.

Ideal for comparing code versions, configuration files, document drafts, or any text content.

howToUse.title: Come utilizzare Text Diff
howToUse.content:
1. Paste the original text in the left panel
  2. Paste the modified text in the right panel
  3. Differences are highlighted immediately: green for additions, red for deletions
  4. Scroll through the diff to review all changes

Works best with structured text like code, configs, or documents with clear line breaks.

features.title: Caratteristiche principali
features.content:

privacy.title: Privacy-First Text Generation
privacy.content:
Lorem Ipsum is generated entirely in your browser using a local word dictionary — no server calls.

  • No data is transmitted — the tool is purely generative
  • Works offline after the page loads
